mnemonics.title: THROWS Declaration
mnemonics.content: Tell Handling Responsibility to Other Sections. It's a declaration, not an implementation.

mnemonics.title: Checked Exceptions
mnemonics.content: CHECK: Caught Higher Exceptions Keep bubbling. IOException, SQLException, and FileNotFoundException are examples.

mnemonics.title: throw vs throws
mnemonics.content: Throw Takes One, Throws Takes Many. throw is for a single exception instance, while throws is for multiple exception types.
